headline: SIGNAL SCAN — Jun 23

XBI $145.86 (+4.6%) — Biotech sector bid on risk-on sentiment lifting speculative growth names broadly. *Cyclical growth is commanding the session — semiconductors and biotech surging while defense and crypto lag the risk-on rotation.* POSITIONING BTC ETF flows (CoinGlass via g2-data, provider-reported) (Mon close, 1 trading day old): -$68M outflow (IBIT -$172M, GBTC -$81M, ARKB +$64M). The strategic question is whether this move has fundamental legs or is a positioning squeeze. Watch whether biotech holds gains and whether defense stabilizes — those confirm or deny the breadth of today's risk-on thesis. api.agentcanary.ai/api/docs npm i agentcanary-mcp Not financial advice
